hero_subtitle: A secure and modern platform built with Maithil culture and traditions in mind. Discover fully verified (OTP Verified) profiles, secure gotra matching, and precise partner searches based on your preferences.
landing_why_desc: Preserving legacy through verified cultural lineage, secure gotra rules, and trusted connections.
landing_why_item1_desc: Automated filters screen matches based on traditional gotra customs to align with lineage values.
landing_why_item2_desc: Off-line simulated OTP authentication prevents unverified profiles and secures contact databases.
landing_what_desc: A modern visual experience designed to make matrimonial search delightful, interactive, and fast.
landing_what_item1_desc: Every candidate is vetted with simulated contact authentication to eliminate spam and ensure authentic credentials.
landing_what_item2_desc: Intelligent Gotra-compatibility rules matched with age, income, and lifestyle filters to guide you to the right partner.
landing_what_item3_desc: Connecting Maithil families across Bangalore, Delhi NCR, Patna, Darbhanga, Mumbai, and worldwide.
landing_who_desc: Bridging legacy roots and progressive hearts to connect Maithil families globally.
landing_who_item1_desc: Connecting candidates across Bangalore, Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Patna, Darbhanga, and globally.
landing_who_item2_desc: Respecting your privacy, values, and traditions while providing cutting edge searching interfaces.
auth_subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a verification OTP
msg_check_email_otp: Please check your email for the verification code.
error_invalid_otp: Incorrect or expired OTP verification code.
bot_welcome: Namaste! Welcome to Maithil Match. Let's create your matrimonial biodata in an engaging way. First, what is your full name?
bot_phone: Thank you, {name}! Please enter your mobile number.
bot_gender: Pleasure to meet you, {name}! Please select your gender.
bot_age: Great. Now, how old are you? (Must be 18 to 70 years)
bot_gotra: Important question! What is your cultural Gotra?
bot_city: Got it. In which city do you currently reside?
bot_education: Excellent. What is your highest educational qualification?
bot_profession: What is your current occupation or profession?
bot_income: Thank you. What is your annual income (INR)?
bot_interests: Almost there! Select your hobbies and interests (choose at least one).
bot_bio: Write a brief, warm 'About Me' description.
bot_photo: Perfect! Finally, please upload a nice profile photo so compatible matches can see your warm smile.
bot_summary: Excellent! I have compiled your Maithil Biodata. Please review the summary card below.
chat_error_empty: Please provide a valid text input.
chat_error_age: Age must be a number between 18 and 70.
chat_error_income: Annual income must be a valid positive number.
browse_subtitle: Profiles are evaluated based on gotra compatibility, location filters, and age preferences.
browse_alert: Automatically calculated opposite gender matches with compatible Gotras
no_matches: No compatible profiles found matching your compatibility criteria. Try modifying your preferences!
premium_desc: Upgrade your plan to view contact details.
app_a_very_easy_4_step_process_to_find_y: A very easy 4 step process to find your partner.
app_create_your_biodata_completely_free_: Create your biodata completely free in just a few easy steps and start searching.
app_you_can_easily_search_biodata_using_: You can easily search biodata using many filters including age, profession, educational qualification, gotra and more.
app_if_you_feel_the_connection_is_strong: If you feel the connection is strong, contact their guardians directly and proceed to get married according to traditions.
app_register_to_view_your_perfect_matche: Register to view your perfect matches
app_join_the_fastest_growing_maithil_mat: Join the fastest growing Maithil matrimonial network.
app_all_rights_reserved_proudly_protecti: All Rights Reserved. Proudly protecting Maithil heritage and lineage custom safeties.
app_developed_with_pure_vanilla_css_reac: Developed with Pure Vanilla CSS & React 19
app_footer_brand_desc: The premier cultural matrimonial portal tailored for global Maithil families. Designed with heritage aesthetics, secure gotra rules, and high-fidelity compatibility algorithms.
auth_subtitle_login: Login with your email and password
auth_subtitle_register: Register with an email one-time password
bot_set_password: Please set a secure password for your account (min 6 chars).
error_short_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
